name: OptionStrat
description_short: Visual options strategy builder with profit/loss visualization, options flow, and real-time Greeks analysis.
description_long:
OptionStrat is a visual options analysis platform that makes complex options strategies easy to understand through intuitive profit/loss diagrams, real-time Greeks tracking, and a drag-and-drop strategy builder. The platform is popular among options traders who want to visualize their risk before entering positions.

The strategy builder lets traders construct multi-leg options positions and instantly see the expected profit/loss at any price point and expiration date. Combined with real-time options flow data, traders can spot unusual activity and quickly model potential trades based on institutional positioning.

OptionStrat's Live Flow feature at $49.99/month provides real-time options flow data with filtering capabilities, making it a more affordable alternative to premium flow platforms. The platform also offers educational content that helps newer options traders understand strategies like iron condors, butterflies, and calendar spreads.
pros: Best visual P&L diagrams for options strategies
Excellent educational content for learning options
cons: No broker integration for direct execution
Limited to options analysis, no charting for other assets
